items.title: In any successful ML project, evaluation takes the most preparation, followed by data hygiene, and last is hill climb…
items.body: In any successful ML project, evaluation takes the most preparation, followed by data hygiene, and last is hill climbing. Without the first two, you might climb the wrong hill and celebrate premature success.
